## Synthetic deterministic evidence

Debug and Release independently generate the same canonical synthetic evidence and report. The synthetic corpus proves:

- evidence round-trip,
- trailing-checksum corruption rejection,
- six-order balance,
- one A-to-B transition,
- one B-to-C transition,
- Owner-only report boundaries.

## Real-GPU pass condition

The real measurement must use a non-software D3D12 adapter, collect all seven U cases, preserve numeric validity and Candidate output identity, write all evidence files, and generate the non-authoritative Decision Report.
